creator: dan@pelleg.org
text:
Regarding net/unison, the patch contains a minor tab/space issue on =
Makefile:24, fixed here.

The patch or net/unison-devel has an issue, I can't approve it yet.

diff -ruN /usr/ports/net/unison/Makefile =
/usr/ports/net/unison-2.32.52/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/net/unison/Makefile	2010-03-28 09:41:29.000000000 =
+0300
+++ /usr/ports/net/unison-2.32.52/Makefile	2011-01-05 =
21:44:46.000000000 +0200
@@ -6,8 +6,7 @@
 #
=20
 PORTNAME=3D	unison
-PORTVERSION=3D	2.27.157
-PORTREVISION?=3D	2
+PORTVERSION=3D	2.32.52
 CATEGORIES=3D	net
 MASTER_SITES=3D	=
http://www.cis.upenn.edu/~bcpierce/unison/download/releases/${DISTNAME}/
 DISTFILES=3D	${EXTRACT_ONLY} ${EXTRA_DOCS}
@@ -22,6 +21,8 @@
 MAKE_ARGS=3D	CFLAGS=3D""
 CONFLICTS=3D	unison-devel-[0-9]* unison-nox11-[0-9]*
=20
+MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=3D	yes
+
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
=20
 .if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
diff -ruN /usr/ports/net/unison/distinfo =
/usr/ports/net/unison-2.32.52/distinfo

+0300
+++ /usr/ports/net/unison-2.32.52/distinfo	2011-01-05 =
21:44:46.000000000 +0200
